title: Sentiment Weakened By Risk Off Tone Across Markets
section_path: Sentiment Weakened By Risk Off Tone Across Markets
section_path_text: Sentiment Weakened By Risk Off Tone Across Markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk off tone across markets weighed on sentiment amid concerns of tight monetary policy and darkening geopolitical backdrop. Crude oil prices traded in a tight range as the market weighed up diplomatic efforts in the Middle East against the broader impact of geopolitical tensions on oil supply. The White House confirmed that President Joe Biden will travel to Israel this week in an effort to prevent a regional outbreak of the Israel-Hamas war.
